user_message: Just got this from Laura Anderson at Lucerne Publishing -- I need help figuring out escalation triage. The customer escalated this morning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 15:55 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 15:20 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Lucerne Publishing

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-K trap (Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-K failure mode (Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-K -- Dark-customer-outreach module's sequence pattern isn't right for unexpected re-e
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
